{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''Assessor'', this is ''Dorion Discus''. Ah, negative on customs inspection. We have a priority cargo for the Imperial base on Markon IV.|Roark Garnet attempts to bluff the Imperial Customs Frigate ''Assessor''|<ref name="TRG1" />}}
'''Markon IV''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="TRG1" /> located in the [[Markon system/Legends|Markon system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], it hosted an Imperial [[Unidentified Imperial base (Markon IV)|base]].<ref name="TRG1" />

At one point during that conflict, the [[Imperial Customs Frigate]] [[Assessor (Imperial Customs Frigate)|''Assessor'']] intercepted the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Dorion Discus]]'' in the [[Thorgeld system/Legends|Thorgeld system]]. Hoping to stall for [[Time/Legends|time]] before executing a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump out of the [[Star system/Legends|system]], the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet]] contacted the ''Assessor'' and claimed that the ''Dorion Discus'' could not be boarded. The smuggler further bluffed that the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was carrying important cargo for the base on Markon IV and that priority authorization for the shipment had been filed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thorgeld I]], which the vessel had just departed. However, the crew of the ''Assessor'' did not fall for Garnet's bluff and fired a warning shot at the light [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] in response.<ref name="TRG1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Markon IV was first mentioned in the [[1987]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|rulebook]] for the first edition of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TRG1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Markon [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Markon IV, in grid square L-9.<ref name="TEA" />
